title: Rich Creamy British Gruyere Bake
description: A decadent, creamy, and indulgent British-inspired dish perfect for a date night featuring Gruyere cheese and a rich mother sauce base.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
Whisk in the flour and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Slowly pour in the heavy cream and whole milk, whisking continuously to avoid lumps.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until it thickens.
Remove the sauce from the heat and stir in the Gruyere cheese until melted and smooth.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the egg yolks and diploma cheese.
Temper the egg yolks by slowly pouring the warm cheese sauce into the egg yolks, whisking continuously.
Add the dry white wine to the sauce and stir to combine.
Add the chopped chives and fresh thyme to the sauce and stir to combine.
Transfer the sauce to a baking dish and smooth the top.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the sauce is bubbly.
Remove the bake from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes before serving.
